testcase.name: verifySuggestions

failure.message: FAIL: Autocomplete suggestions did not drop down. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: FAIL: Autocomplete suggestions did not drop down. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at failure.message: Mobile Responsiveness Error: Form elements vanished or compressed out of viewport boundaries! expected [true] but found [false]
